Its last assignment was to the 438th Military Airlift Wing, Military Airlift Command, stationed at McGuire Air Force Base, New Jersey.", "50th Airlift Squadron | The 50th Airlift Squadron is a former USAF C-130H squadron that was inactivated in April 2016. The Fightin' 5-0 along with sister squadrons, the 41 AS, 53 AS, and the 61 AS, was assigned to the 19th Operations Group."]
